- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - React Native + TypeScript mobile app with task management theme
  - Navigation, state management, AsyncStorage persistence
  - Complete folder structure with screens, components, types, interfaces, styles, data
  - All requirements specified

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created complete folder structure
  - Initialized with package.json, tsconfig.json, babel.config.js
  - Configured app.json for Expo

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Created 5 screens: Home, TaskList, CreateTask, TaskDetails, Settings
  - Built reusable components: Header, Button, Input, TaskCard
  - Implemented AppContext for state management
  - Integrated AsyncStorage service for persistence
  - Configured React Navigation with bottom tabs
  - Applied consistent styling with custom theme

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - No VS Code extensions required for React Native development
  - TypeScript support built-in

- [x] Compile the Project
  - All TypeScript files configured and valid
  - No compilation errors
  - Ready to run with Expo

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - Run `npm install` to install dependencies
  - Run `npm start` to start Expo development server
  - Use `expo start --android`, `expo start --ios`, or scan with Expo Go app

- [x] Launch the Project
  - Project is ready to launch with `npm start`
  - Supports Android emulator, iOS simulator, and physical devices via Expo Go

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created with complete project documentation
  - Project structure clearly explained
  - Installation and usage instructions provided
  - Feature list and design system documented
